mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM foods WHERE food_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY CASE WHEN food_name = #{keyword} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
CASE WHEN food_name LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%') THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
LENGTH(food_name) ASC,
food_name ASC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT food_id, food_name, calories_kcal, carbs_g, protein_g, fat_g FROM foods
